prompt:
A cinematic street portrait of a young woman walking through a busy city crowd, captured with a panning shot. The subject remains perfectly sharp while the surrounding pedestrians streak into soft horizontal motion blur, creating a strong sense of movement and isolation. The entire environment is black and white except for the subject's vibrant orange trench coat, achieved through selective color grading. Natural wind lifts loose strands of hair, adding emotion and realism. Soft overcast daylight, shallow depth of field, high contrast, subtle film grain, realistic skin texture, editorial fashion photography, Leica M11, 50mm Summilux lens, f/1.4, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic composition, minimal color palette, emotional storytelling, luxury fashion campaign aesthetic, Vogue editorial, award-winning street photography, 8K HDR.

Style: selective color, monochrome city, panning motion blur, frozen subject, urban solitude, cinematic realism, high-end fashion editorial, fine art photography.
